title: OhNetStems
description: This is a mod that adds popular memes from the Chinese internet to Minecraft
body:
This is a mod that adds popular memes from the Chinese internet to Minecraft

Official Announcement on July 30, 2024: Owing to the fact that freeloaders requested the 1.20.6 NeoForge workspace from the author, the original workspace (including any newly constructed 1.20.1 Forge) failed to function properly after the MCr was upgraded to 2024.2. Currently, it has been switched to 1.20.6 NeoForge. The new version is under reworking. Please stay tuned.

Reject freeloaders! Let's start from you and me!!!

### Warning: 

This mod is currently in basic development and has a lot of undecided content that may be removed in a future release!

### About this mod project:
The idea for this project comes from the same meme mod"Stems Further", but open source, long-term updates, and follow-up to the latest Minecraft version (there will be a delay in follow-up)

### Request:

Minecraft version: 1.20.1

Mod loader: Forge

Hardware: Not available

### Found a problem?

You can submit any issues you find [here(Github)](https://github.com/CreateCN/ohnetstems/issues) or [here(A source code hosting platform in China)](https://gitee.com/CreateCN/ohnetstems/issues)

### localization

You can localize [here](https://crowdin.com/project/ohnetstems/invite?h=252a96e894c29abdca8e7f4eb0480cb32147563)

### Help me
Since the author has just learned to make mods, I doesn't know a lot of things, so this project uses a lot of code generated by MCreator, and you are welcome to help improve it

Open source address:[here(Github)](https://github.com/CreateCN/ohnetstems/) or [here(A source code hosting platform in China)](https://gitee.com/CreateCN/ohnetstems/)

# 这个项目将永远不会在mcmod.cn上收录！
# This project will never be included on  mcmod.cn!
Note: Since this project is made by MCreator, in order to ensure the follow-up production, please do not submit it after optimizing the source code, please upload it separately, or send me the built mod file by email (email address: 3137695989@qq.com) to upload the release on Github or Gitee (   remember to sign :)  )
